title: Gravlax
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"af9d8","text":"Gravlax is fresh salmon that’s been cured with a combination of salt, sugar, herbs and grated beetroot. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ea2f1","text":"Get fresh salmon of the highest quality, sashimi-grade, bones removed and skin on.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8rt9k","text":"A series of studies comparing wild caught salmon vs farm raised found that farm raised salmon poses a higher risk of contamination from toxic, cancer-causing chemicals, like PCBs (polychlorinated biphenyls) and dioxins. Try to find wild caught salmon.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Peel 400 g, beetroots and grate it
Put 700 g, fresh salmon in a plastic food container and fully cover it with the mix from Step 5 Salmon skin side should be down
Mix 150 g, sea salt with 90 g, sugar and all ingredients you've prepared above in a bowl
Close the container and refrigerate it Overnight
Remove the mix and refrigerate Overnight again
Serve it on a slice of sourdough bread. Enjoy!
creator: Monika MF Frolova
